EngineOffKeyOn.Description: Prompt the operator to turn the engine off with key on

TestSteps.EngineOffKeyOn: Prompt the operator to turn the engine off with key on

DeterminePreviousPass.Description: Determine if the status of the module in reference to the test

TestSteps.DeterminePreviousPass: Determine if the status of the module in reference to the test

ProgramGetragPPM.Description: Program the broadcast pinion (pulses per mile) in the PCM

TestSteps.ProgramGetragPPM: Program the broadcast pinion (pulses per mile) in the PCM

SetInPlantModeMileageLimit.Description: Set the in-plant mode milage limit

TestSteps.SetInPlantModeMileageLimit: Set the in-plant mode milage limit

EngineOn.Description: Prompt operator to turn the engine on and validate

TestSteps.EngineOn: Prompt operator to turn the engine on and validate

CommandSecurityUnlock.Description: Unlock the PCM module by entering secured access mode

TestSteps.CommandSecurityUnlock: Command the module into secure mode

ProgramEOLStatus.Description: Set the module EOL status flags to testing

TestSteps.ProgramEOLStatus: Program the EOL testing status in the module

EvaluateOdometerIntegrity.Description: Evaluate the integrity of the SRI mileage registers

VerifyVINDigits.Description: Verify the VIN programmed in the module

TestSteps.VerifyVINDigits: Verify the VIN digits match broadcast
TestSteps.VerifyPartNumber: Verify the PCM part number matches broadcast

RecordTraceabilityCode.Description: Read the PCM Serial Number and report to broadcast

TestSteps.RecordTraceabilityCode: Record the Traceability Code that is in the module

RecordInitialModuleFaults.Description: Record Initial Module Faults that are detected in the module

TestSteps.RecordInitialModuleFaults: Record the initial module faults (pre dynamic test)

MonitorMAPSensor.Description: Validate the MAP sensor is functional

TestSteps.MonitorMAPSensor: Validate the MAP sensor is functional

MonitorTPSVoltage.Description: Start the monitoring of the TPS voltage in the background

TestSteps.MonitorTPSVoltage: Start the monitoring of the TPS voltage in the background

MonitorBrakeSwitch.Description: Start the monitoring of the brake switch

TestSteps.MonitorBrakeSwitch: Start the monitoring of the brake switch status

MonitorParkNeutralSwitch.Description: Start the monitoring of the park neutral switch

TestSteps.MonitorParkNeutralSwitch: Start the monitoring of the park neutral switch

EvaluateAISPosition.Description: Evaluate the Automatic Idle Speed Position

TestSteps.EvaluateAISPosition: Evaluate the Automatic Idle Speed Position

MonitorClutchSwitch.Description: Validate the Clutch switch is functional

TestSteps.MonitorClutchSwitch: Validate the Clutch switch is functional

TurboOverboostTest.Description: Validate that the vehicle turbo overboost ran and passed

TestSteps.TurboOverboostTest: Validate that the vehicle turbo overboost ran and passed

StopMonitorBrakeSwitch.Description: Stop the monitoring of the brake swich and return the status of validating both states

TestSteps.StopMonitorBrakeSwitch: Stop the monitoring of the brake switch status and return the results of validating both states

StopMonitorTPSVoltage.Description: Stop the monitoring of TPS voltage in the background and collect the results

TestSteps.StopMonitorTPSVoltage: Stop the monitoring of TPS voltage in the background and collect the results

StopMonitorParkNeutralSwitch.Description: Stop the monitoring of the park neutral swith and return the status of validating both states

TestSteps.StopMonitorParkNeutralSwitch: Stop the monitoring of the park neutral swith and return the status of validating both states

CheckIdleSpeed.Description: Check the idle speed of the engine to determine if it is in the acceptable parameters

TestSteps.CheckIdleSpeed: Check the idle speed of the engine to determine if it is in the acceptable parameters

RecordPCMSelfTestResults.Description: Record the PCM self test resutls

TestSteps.RecordPCMSelfTestResults: Record the PCM self test resutls

RecordFinalModuleFaults.Description: Record the final module faults (post dynamic test)

TestSteps.RecordFinalModuleFaults: Record the final module faults (post dynamic test)

RecordNonPCMTestResults.Description: Record the final results of all non PCM tests in module

TestSteps.RecordNonPCMTestResults: Record the final results of all non PCM tests in module

ValidateOverallTestResults.Description: Validate that all of the rolls test were performed and passed

TestSteps.ValidateOverallTestResults: Validate that all of the rolls test were performed and passed

ClearEOLStatus.Description: Update the modules status registers at the end of the test and set OK to Ship if passed

TestSteps.ClearEOLStatus: Update the modules status registers at the end of the test and set OK to Ship if passed

FinishUp.Description: Request the overall result from the component

TestSteps.FinishUp: Request the overall result from the component

KeyOn.Description: Prompt operator to turn the key on

TestSteps.KeyOn: Prompt operator to turn the key on

KeyOff.Description: Prompt the driver to turn the key off

TestSteps.KeyOff: Prompt operator to turn the key off

CheckUplineRegisters.Description: Check the vehicles upline registers for results

UnusedTestSteps.CheckUplineRegisters: Check the status of the upline tests

CheckOnlineRegisters.Description: Check the online registers for results

UnusedTestSteps.CheckOnlineRegisters: Check the status of the online tests
UnusedTestSteps.NGCTestSetup: Combination setup test step for NGC PCMs
UnusedTestSteps.UpdateOverallRollTestStatus: Update the overall roll test status in rolls
